final_prompt.prompt:
Create a lifestyle photograph of coffee and desserts in a Korean cafe, styled for Instagram.

Style/medium: needs a "Korean cafe" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Seoul 延南洞 cafe interior photography, Korean Instagram lifestyle content (인스타 감성), Kinfolk magazine minimal food styling; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be smartphone-captured angle, no people visible
Subject: must include coffee beverage and dessert items as focal subjects
Scene/backdrop: must be a Korean cafe interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs bright natural window light with soft shadows — exact lighting balance is yours
Color palette: needs warm neutral tones with cream and beige dominance — exact color mixing is yours
Materials/textures: must include ceramic cups, wooden tables, fabric napkins — exact material choices are yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotations with 7:3 hiragana-to-kanji ratio, diary-style short comments for each element:
  ・Drink comments: taste/temperature/mood (e.g., 爽やか、優しい甘み)
  ・Food comments: texture/deliciousness (e.g., しっとり、最高)
  ・Space comments: atmosphere (e.g., リラックス、素敵な時間)
  ・Overall comment: one-line summary (e.g., 幸せすぎる〜)
Constraints: must include white fine hand-drawn sketch lines around elements, contour tracing style, arrows/dashed lines for visual guidance, steam/sparkles/hearts/small emoticons as decoration with intentional blank space, Instagram story / magazine rough-note aesthetic, fashionable yet relaxed atmosphere, single-stroke rough uneven handwriting style
Avoid: no people, no over-decoration
